description: Unique identifier for the ad. Serves as the primary key for this table. Joins to basic_ad.ad_id and ad_conversion.id.
The last time this ad was updated (e.g., edited, paused, or resumed).
The Ad Account ID that owns this ad.
ID of the campaign that the ad belongs to.
ID referencing the ad's creative element (image, video, carousel, etc.).
The bid amount in the ad's configured currency units (usually cents or smallest denomination).
Bidding method used - e.g., CPC (Cost per Click), CPM (Cost per 1,000 Impressions), CPA (Cost per Action).
Advertiser-set status of the ad, such as ACTIVE, PAUSED, ARCHIVED, or DELETED.
The domain used for conversion tracking (e.g., www.example.com).
Timestamp when the ad was originally created.
The operational status considering business rules (e.g., ACTIVE, PAUSED, IN_REVIEW).
The app ID that last modified the ad (if changed via API or automation tool).
The ad's name or descriptive title as configured in Facebook Ads Manager.
A shareable preview URL of the ad as seen on Facebook or Instagram.
Internal or legacy ad status; may overlap with configured_status for older versions.
ID of the ad set (ad group) that this ad belongs to.
Internal or partner ID related to the creative source or generation method.
Meta-issued notes or compliance flags related to discriminatory practices for this ad globally.
Instagram-specific compliance notes if the ad violated platform-level targeting rules.
Facebook-specific discriminatory flag details for this ad placement.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
